item.title: Google Cloud Bigtable
item.description: Overview Large analytical/operational workloads Key-value store High read/write rates, low latency Tables stored in instances Up to four nodes in different zones Use cases: Time-series data Marketing/financial data IoT data References GCP Services

item.title: Google Cloud Firebase
item.description: Overview NoSQL database Store and synchronize data Collaboration amongst users and devices in real time Mobile apps use-case References GCP Services

item.title: Google Cloud Memorystore
item.description: Overview In memory database Redis Memcached Low latency, high throughput Use cases: Cached data References GCP Services

item.title: Google Cloud Spanner
item.description: Overview Relational—SQL 99.999% availability (5 nines) Unlimited scale For each instance, define: Configuration Compute capacity Auto sharding External consistency Backup/restore, point-in-time recovery (PITR) Use query parameters to increase efficiency and reduce cost References GCP Services

item.title: Google Cloud SQL
item.description: Overview Relational database Supports: SQL Server MySQL PostreSQL Auto replication, failover, backup, and point-in-time recovery (PITR)—built in HA Auto scales to 30 TB Scales manually to 96 cores / 624 GB RAM Read replicas available References GCP Services
